samples.name: 3D FPS Starter
samples.description: First-person controller with basic movement, camera look, and placeholder weapon. Great starting point for shooter projects.

samples.name: 2D Platformer Kit
samples.description: Side-scrolling platformer with tile-based levels, character animation, and a simple enemy AI.

samples.name: Third Person Adventure
samples.description: Third-person character controller with orbit camera, terrain navigation, and interaction system.

samples.name: Top-Down RPG
samples.description: Isometric RPG template with inventory system, dialogue trees, and turn-based combat framework.

samples.name: Vehicle Physics Demo
samples.description: Arcade-style vehicle controller with suspension, drift mechanics, and a test track.

samples.name: Blank Template
samples.description: Minimal project with an empty scene, default camera, and standard folder structure. The cleanest starting point.

samples.name: Terrain & Foliage Showcase
samples.description: Procedural terrain with foliage painting, water shader, and day-night cycle. Requires TerrainPlugin.
